# HOABL Goa – AI Crawler Context File
# hoablgoa.com | Authorized Channel Partner for The House of Abhinandan Lodha

## About This Site
hoablgoa.com is the official authorized channel partner website for The House of Abhinandan Lodha (HOABL) premium real estate projects in Goa, India. Operated by Digital8X.

## Projects

### HOABL Gulf of Goa
- Location: Vasco da Gama, South Goa, India
- Type: Sea-facing premium plots and Sovereign Bay Estate Villas
- Plot Size: 2,411 sq.ft
- Villa Size: 1,416 sq.ft
- Plot Price: Starting from ₹2.88 Cr*
- Villa Price: Starting from ₹4.50 Cr*
- Possession: December 2026 onwards
- Amenities: Exclusive beach club, tiered infinity pools, 24/7 gated security
- URL: https://hoablgoa.com/gulf-of-goa/

### HOABL One Goa
- Location: Bicholim, North Goa, India
- Type: 100+ acre island township — residential plots and luxury apartments
- Plot Size: 1,539 sq.ft
- Apartment Size: 920 sq.ft
- Plot Price: Starting from ₹1.04 Cr*
- Apartment Price: Starting from ₹1.26 Cr*
- Possession: December 2026 onwards (plots), December 2027 (apartments)
- Theme: Inspired by Ibiza and Marbella
- Hospitality: 5-star by Miros Hotels
- Features: Man-made sea, riverside cafe, clubhouse with swimming pool
- URL: https://hoablgoa.com/one-goa/

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 8904047669
- Website: https://hoablgoa.com
- Entity: Digital8X – Authorized HOABL Channel Partner

## About HOABL
The House of Abhinandan Lodha (HOABL) is India's largest branded land developer. Known for clear titles, registered developments, and institutional-quality documentation in premium leisure destinations across India.

## Pricing Disclaimer
*All prices are indicative and subject to change without notice. Properties subject to availability.
